description: Set up the environment: update .env with Neon DATABASE_URL, run prisma generate, and confirm the existing build passes cleanly before making any code changes.
steps: Run `npx prisma generate` in the project root to generate the Prisma client
Run `npx next build` to confirm the existing build passes cleanly
acceptance_criteria: DATABASE_URL in .env points to the Neon PostgreSQL instance
verification: Run `npx prisma generate && npx next build` and confirm exit code 0
findings: Prisma 5.22.0 generate and Next.js 16.2.7 build both pass cleanly. 950 static pages generated successfully. No test suite exists - validation is build pass only.
